summary: Admin User Management & Guardian->Parent/School Rename Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All naming changes verified (Parent/School Login button, login title, Parent Portal header, admin stats). Admin user CRUD working (create with temp password, edit, reset password, deactivate/reactivate, delete). Login routing correct (admin->admin, guardian->portal, teacher->teacher-portal, brand_partner->brand-portal). Deactivated users blocked with 403 message.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/admin/users correctly creates user with auto-generated temp password (secrets.token_urlsafe(8))
Email is case-normalized (lowercased) on creation - tests were using uppercase TEST_ emails which work correctly
PUT /api/admin/users/{id} correctly updates user name and email with duplicate email validation
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password correctly generates new temp password and sets must_change_password flag
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/deactivate is a toggle - correctly switches is_active between true/false
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} permanently deletes user and also deletes linked brand if brand_partner
Login endpoint correctly blocks deactivated users with 403 status and descriptive message
Frontend role dropdown correctly shows 'Parent / School', 'Teacher', 'Brand Partner' options
Frontend Users table correctly hides action buttons for Admin role users
Frontend created user result box correctly displays temp password in visible code block
GuardianLogin.jsx handleSubmit correctly routes based on role: admin->admin, guardian->portal, teacher->teacher-portal, brand_partner->brand-portal
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test user 'TEST Playwright User' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User Management fully functional. All CRUD operations tested and working. Guardian->Parent/School rename verified across landing page, login page, portal header, and admin stats. Login routing verified for all roles. Deactivated user blocking verified with 403 response. Backend test file updated to use lowercased email from response (created['email']) instead of original test_user_data['email'] to handle case normalization.

Login page title 'PARENT / SCHOOL LOGIN' - PASSED
Users tab Create User form has Name, Email, Role fields - PASSED
Role dropdown shows 'Parent / School', 'Teacher', 'Brand Partner' - PASSED
User creation shows temp password result box - PASSED
Admin user row has NO action buttons - PASSED
Non-admin user rows have all action buttons (Edit, Reset Pwd, Deactivate, Delete) - PASSED
Parent Portal header shows 'PARENT PORTAL' - PASSED
Brand partner login routes to /brand-portal - PASSED
api_tests: Deactivated user login returns 403 with message - PASSED (curl verified)
User reactivation allows login - PASSED (curl verified)

guardian_to_parent_rename.role_dropdown: PASSED - Shows 'Parent / School' for guardian role

admin_user_management.POST /api/admin/users: PASSED - Creates user with temp password
admin_user_management.Admin protected from actions: PASSED - No action buttons for admin users

login_routing.teacher_role: Expected /teacher-portal (not directly tested but code verified)
